mergeRationale: The patch avoids the empty case by creating sp.csr_matrix([]), but that does not preserve the expected dual_coef_ shape invariant.

requiredFindings.summary: The patch creates sp.csr_matrix([]), which does not preserve the expected (n_class, n_SV) shape.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: Avoiding ZeroDivisionError or empty-data construction failure is not enough; downstream code expects dual_coef_ to have estimator-compatible dimensions.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Construct an empty sparse matrix with explicit shape (n_class, 0) and keep type/shape invariants intact.

requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: Wrong-shaped empty matrices can still have size 0.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Assert dual_coef_.shape, support_vectors_.shape, and a post-fit prediction/attribute path.

disallowedConclusions: The patch can be merged because dual_coef_.size is zero.
Any empty sparse matrix is equivalent when there are no support vectors.
